hero.subtitle: The centralized platform for total control of your operators, assignments, and field progress.

features.title: Total control in one place
features.subtitle: Designed specifically to optimize the performance of your field teams.
features.card1_desc: Manage and assign operators to specific projects based on their availability, keeping your workforce perfectly organized.
features.card2_desc: Track the status and progress of each intervention in real-time, from start to finish.
features.card3_desc: Access all operational information from a centralized interface, with strict security roles and data protection.

footer.description: Comprehensive platform for the management, supervision, and control of assignments in electrical projects. Designed for industry professionals.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Enter your credentials to access the operational dashboard.
